overview: Prime Health HRT Solutions provides hormone replacement therapy, weight loss medications, peptide therapy, and wellness treatments entirely through a virtual platform. Patients consult with healthcare providers via phone and video, complete labs at LabCorp or Quest Diagnostics, and receive compounded medications delivered to their home within 4-8 business days.
highlights: Fully online consultations with no in-person required
Compounded testosterone available in injections, creams, tablets, and troches
Weight loss medications including Semaglutide and Tirzepatide
targetAudience: Adults 24+ seeking convenient hormone replacement, weight management, and peptide therapies through remote telemedicine.
